name: session-bridge
description: ChatGPT credential converter with browser-side RT refresh and AT validation on Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.build: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run typecheck && bun test && vite build && bun run scripts/check-build.ts
scripts.dev:pages: bun run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bunx --bun wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=session-bridge
